title: AI Development & Automation
text: Building intelligent AI-powered systems — voice agents, LLM workflows, and autonomous pipelines that automate complex business operations end-to-end.

title: Full Stack Web Development
text: Designing and delivering scalable full-stack applications using Python (FastAPI, Django), React, Next.js, Angular, and cloud-native deployments on AWS and Azure.

title: LLM & Prompt Engineering
text: Crafting optimized prompts and fine-tuning LLM outputs (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude) for production use cases — reducing bias, improving accuracy and consistency.

title: Voice AI Agents
text: Building production-grade voice AI agents with Vapi and Twilio — multi-agent squads for outbound calling, screening, scheduling, and warm transfers.
